title: Chief-of-Staff UX Audit Upgrade Specification
summary: Upgraded Today from passive metrics into a compact Chief-of-Staff command center with deterministic recommendations, action routing, hardened production verification, and production-verified flows.
next_action: Optional polish: expand the Chief-of-Staff recommendation model beyond deterministic local signals when server-side ranking is available.

resume_context.last_completed_step: Production simulator verification passed against maraithon.com for kent@runner.now after final Today layout polish.
resume_context.notes: User delegated product decisions. The implemented direction treats Today as a decision surface, Todos as the execution queue, People as relationship care, and Chat as the Chief-of-Staff pane.

verification.production_assertions: passed: todo created/completed, person created/updated for kent@runner.now
verification.notes: The verified app was launched in Simulator as com.bliss.maraithonmobile after the production run. The verification script now builds once, mints the UI-test magic token immediately before launch, and retries with a fresh token/run id if production rejects a one-time token.

history.note: Initial Chief-of-Staff UX audit spec saved.
